name: cubes-3-collaboratif
description: A full-stack, containerized, microservices-based food delivery application built with React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Docker.

scripts.test:all-units: npm run test:auth && npm run test:logistics && npm run test:orders
scripts.test:all: npm run test:all-units && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:integration && npm run test:frontend:e2e
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:auth && cd auth-api && npm run test:coverage && cd .. && cd commande-api && npm run test:coverage && cd .. && cd frontend && npm run test:coverage
